guideMessages.intro: Woof! Im Bruno. I have a heartfelt surprise for you.
guideMessages.wishScreen: Close your eyes... make a wish as pure as your heart.
guideMessages.cakeScreen: A cake baked with love! Tap the candles to blow them out.
guideMessages.letterScreen: I wrote this letter just for you. ??

letterTemplate: On this beautiful day, I want to remind you of how truly special you are.
Like a rose in full bloom, your presence adds color and fragrance to the world.
May your year be filled with laughter that makes your cheeks hurt,
Dreams that feel almost too big to be true,
And love that surrounds you like a warm embrace.
